{{R|Hefty Tablet||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. Choose 1 of 3 {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rare Cards|2}} to add to your Deck. Add 1 {{C|Injury||2}} to your Deck.

== Sources ==
At the start of the run, can be offered by {{KW|Neow||2}}.
